title: WebSocket connection issues with Cloudflare Tunnel and SafeLine WAF
symptom: When executing a workflow, n8n displays 'Lost connection to the server'. Logs show 'Invalid origin' and 'Origin is undefined'.
applies_when: Accessing via Cloudflare Tunnel and SafeLine WAF
root_cause: The error occurs due to WebSocket connections being blocked or improperly forwarded by the Cloudflare Tunnel and SafeLine WAF. These components may not support WebSocket upgrades or may require specific configurations to allow them.
fix_steps: Configure n8n environment variables in Docker to allow your Cloudflare Tunnel domain.
Ensure WebSocket support is enabled in your Cloudflare Tunnel configuration.
Whitelist WebSocket paths and allow upgrade headers in SafeLine WAF.
Update Docker network configuration to ensure proper header forwarding.
Test the WebSocket connection using browser DevTools.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to configure n8n and your proxy settings for WebSocket support.
safety_notes: Using 'N8N_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=*' allows all origins temporarily; restrict it after testing.
